creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Last versions of lang/lua52 do seems to install a pkgconfig file, but it is named "lua-5.2" :
% pkg which /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/lua-5.2.pc
/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/lua-5.2.pc was installed by package
lua52-5.2.3_2

Since darktable, for now, only searches for lua and lua52 pkg-config names, it is still needed to patch the FindLUA52.cmake file, but it becomes trivial:
===================================================
--- ./cmake/modules/FindLua52.cmake.orig	2014-02-01 14:22:08.000000000 +0100
+++ ./cmake/modules/FindLua52.cmake	2014-02-01 14:22:17.000000000 +0100
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 include(Prebuilt)
 include(FindPkgConfig)
 
-pkg_search_module(LUA52 lua5.2 lua)
+pkg_search_module(LUA52 lua5.2 lua-5.2 lua)
 
 if(LUA52_FIND_VERSION)
   cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.6.2)
===================================================

(this was also submitted to upstream team).

Else than that, +1 to update it, this version brings nice improvements to my workflow.

-- 
Matthieu Volat
www: <http://500px.com/Mazhe>
